description: Fitz wakes from cryo-sleep aboard Enoch’s vessel. Enoch briefs him on the coming challenges and the mission to reunite with the S.H.I.E.L.D. team at the Lighthouse, preparing Fitz to face the threats that await. The episode closes with renewed determination as Fitz steels himself for the dangerous road ahead.

transcript.line: Good morning, Fitz. Rise and shine. While you were asleep, I had time to put a plan in motion. We have a few days until we arrive at the Lighthouse. That should give me enough time to prepare you.
For facing off against some of the most ruthless and brutal mobsters, monsters, and mercenaries in the galaxy. I hope you have it in you.
